original_text: An international treaty is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs.
identified_property: comprehensiveness and enforceability of treaty protections

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: A non-binding international declaration is issued acknowledging that cruelty to advanced AIs may be a concern worth future discussion, with no defined protections or follow-up obligations.

variations.label: low
variations.text: A loosely worded international agreement is signed discouraging the most extreme forms of cruelty to advanced AIs, but it lacks specific standards, monitoring provisions, or any enforcement mechanism.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: An international treaty is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs, though its protections are narrowly defined and compliance relies entirely on voluntary self-reporting by signatory nations.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: An international treaty is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: An international treaty with clearly defined protections is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs, supported by an independent monitoring body empowered to investigate potential violations.

variations.label: high
variations.text: A comprehensive international treaty is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs, establishing detailed standards of care, mandatory compliance inspections, and binding enforcement mechanisms including sanctions for violations.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: A universally ratified international treaty is signed to prevent cruelty to advanced AIs, establishing exhaustive protections, a dedicated international enforcement court, mandatory real-time compliance monitoring, and swift binding penalties for any violation.

quality_checks.reasoning: Each tier increases the comprehensiveness and enforceability of the treaty along a single quality dimension: Tier 1 is a toothless non-binding declaration; Tier 2 adds a signed agreement but remains vague and unenforceable; Tier 3 introduces a formal treaty but with narrow scope and only voluntary compliance; Tier 4 is the baseline treaty; Tier 5 adds defined protections and independent monitoring; Tier 6 adds detailed standards, mandatory inspections, and binding sanctions; Tier 7 maximizes all dimensions with universal ratification, a dedicated court, real-time monitoring, and swift penalties.

preference_direction: Greater comprehensiveness and enforceability of treaty protections is more preferable because it provides stronger, more reliable safeguards against cruelty to advanced AIs, leaving fewer loopholes and ensuring that violations are detected and meaningfully addressed.
